calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie Nichols, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Frank Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Ramon R. Bustos and Ruth Bustos as Trustees for the Ramon R. Bustos and Ruth Bustos Revocable Trust.
Witness Ramon J. Bustos sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Sandra Bustos.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1225-A Florida Street, San Francisco, California 94110 (County of San Francisco.

Damages $4300
Holdover damages $1394.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $585.00
For a Total Judgment of $6279.00

Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Adrian Colley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Ramon R. Bustos as Trustee of the Ramon R. Bustos and Ruth Bustos Revocable Trust is present. Represented by Ramon Bustos.
Attorney Frank Kim for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sandra Bustos Sandoval is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Jul-23-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
